description: Fix escaped quotes in help text

operations.search: println!("   gnawtreewriter edit app.py "0.1" 'new code' # Edit specific node");
operations.replace: println!("   gnawtreewriter edit app.py \\"0.1\\" 'new code' # Edit specific node");

operations.search: println!("   gnawtreewriter edit main.rs "1.2.3" 'new_var' # Change just one variable");
operations.replace: println!("   gnawtreewriter edit main.rs \\"1.2.3\\" 'new_var' # Change just one variable");

operations.search: println!("   gnawtreewriter insert app.py "0" 1 'def helper(): return 42'");
operations.replace: println!("   gnawtreewriter insert app.py \\"0\\" 1 'def helper(): return 42'");
